title: Add Toddler Read QR Card Generator to learn
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: QR codes for tiny humans
gist.blurb: The hive is growing! We just added the Toddler Read QR Card Generator to our community showcase, making it easy to create screen-free learning cards for the little ones.
gist.summary: Added the Toddler Read QR Card Generator to the community apps showcase under the learning category.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and use a new tool to generate printable, QR-enabled learning cards designed for screen-free toddler interaction.
gist.visual_concept: A cute pixel art scene focusing on early childhood education and QR codes. The pollinations bee mascot scanning a chunky pixel QR code on a baby flashcard.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute bee mascot with a yellow body, dark brown stripes, pink blush marks, and tiny translucent wings scanning a chunky pixelated QR code on a large baby flashcard. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley or A Short Hike. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute bee mascot with a yellow body, dark brown stripes, pink blush marks, and tiny translucent wings scanning a chunky pixelated QR code on a large baby flashcard. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley or A Short Hike.
